title: patrinia kozushimensis
intro: Patrinia kozushimensis, also known as Patrinia, is a perennial herb native to East Asia, characterized by its clusters of small white flowers and yellow stamens. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiviral properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Patrinia kozushimensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, Patrinia is often dried and used as a tea, or it can be made into a tincture or infusion to utilize its medicinal properties.
